members.name: Andra Delanoye
members.bio_long: Host and co-founder of FARMform with a deep passion for hospitality.
members.image_alt: Andra Delanoye, Co-Founder and Host of FARMform

paragraphs: While we created FARMform together, I now have the privilege of running the operations.
Welcoming guests here, seeing them relax, focus and connect in this environment is what makes all those years of effort worthwhile.
We look forward to sharing not just our property, but also the story and spirit behind it – with you.
